rules.rule: every asset record MUST carry sha256; sha256 mismatch on re-verification is fail-closed.
missing prompt_revision_id on a generated asset blocks publication selection.
missing grounding_id on any asset blocks publication selection (grounding-preservation invariant).
selection of an asset whose lifecycle state is NOT reviewer-approved is fail-closed.
OEM source assets MUST NEVER be overwritten; integrity check refuses any record claiming to overwrite an OEM source path.
rollback MUST restore by appending a reverse selection event; destructive deletion of asset records is FORBIDDEN.
cross-manual reuse of an asset MUST cite reviewer attestation and the source manual_id.
